metadata.name: NoyAcg
metadata.description: NoyAcg - 需要登录后才能访问全部工作流

metadata.notes: 已验证站点依赖 NOY_SESSION Cookie，初始化阶段会使用已保存账号自动登录。

initialize.description: 使用已保存凭据自动登录并刷新 WebView Cookie

actions.code: (() => { const user = String(`{{login.username}}` || '').trim(); const pass = String(`{{login.password}}` || '').trim(); if (!user || !pass) { return JSON.stringify({ skipped: true, reason: 'missing_credentials' }); } const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/login', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('user=' + encodeURIComponent(user) + '&pass=' + encodeURIComponent(pass)); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 初始化登录失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (data.status !== 'ok') { throw new Error('NoyAcg 初始化登录失败'); } return JSON.stringify({ status: data.status, session: data.SESSION || '' }); })();

login.description: 使用输入的账号密码登录 NoyAcg

actions.code: (() => { const user = String(`{{username}}` || '').trim(); const pass = String(`{{password}}` || '').trim(); if (!user || !pass) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录缺少用户名或密码'); } const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/login', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('user=' + encodeURIComponent(user) + '&pass=' + encodeURIComponent(pass)); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (data.status !== 'ok') { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录失败'); } return JSON.stringify({ status: data.status, session: data.SESSION || '' }); })();

(() => { const page = Math.max(1, parseInt('{{page}}', 10) || 1); const imageCdn = '{{imageCdn}}'; const toGenre = (item) => [String(item.Ptag || '').replace(/\s+/g, ', ').replace(/,+/g, ', ').replace(/^, |, $/g, ''), String(item.Otag || '')].filter(Boolean).join(', '); const toDesc = (item) => ['时间：' + (item.Time ? new Date(Number(item.Time) * 1000).toISOString().replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 19) : ''), '页数：' + String(item.Len || 0), '原作：' + String(item.Otag || ''), '角色：' + String(item.Pname || '')].join('\n'); const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/readLeaderboard', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('page=' + encodeURIComponent(String(page)) + '&type=day'); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 热门获取失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (data.status === 'login' || (Array.isArray(data) && data[0] === 'login')) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录已失效'); } const list = Array.isArray(data.info) ? data.info : (Array.isArray(data.Info) ? data.Info : []); const total = Number(data.len || 0); const mangas = list.map((item) => ({ id: String(item.Bid || ''), url: String(item.Bid || ''), title: String(item.Bookname || ''), author: String(item.Author || ''), cover: imageCdn + '/' + String(item.Bid || '') + '/m1.webp', status: 'completed', description: toDesc(item), genre: toGenre(item) })); return JSON.stringify({ mangas: mangas, total: total, hasNextPage: page * 20 < total }); })();
actions.description: 调用阅读榜接口并映射作品数据

actions.code: (() => { const page = Math.max(1, parseInt('{{page}}', 10) || 1); const imageCdn = '{{imageCdn}}'; const toGenre = (item) => [String(item.Ptag || '').replace(/\s+/g, ', ').replace(/,+/g, ', ').replace(/^, |, $/g, ''), String(item.Otag || '')].filter(Boolean).join(', '); const toDesc = (item) => ['时间：' + (item.Time ? new Date(Number(item.Time) * 1000).toISOString().replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 19) : ''), '页数：' + String(item.Len || 0), '原作：' + String(item.Otag || ''), '角色：' + String(item.Pname || '')].join('\n'); const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/booklist_v2', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('page=' + encodeURIComponent(String(page))); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 最新获取失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (data.status === 'login' || (Array.isArray(data) && data[0] === 'login')) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录已失效'); } const list = Array.isArray(data.info) ? data.info : (Array.isArray(data.Info) ? data.Info : []); const total = Number(data.len || 0); const mangas = list.map((item) => ({ id: String(item.Bid || ''), url: String(item.Bid || ''), title: String(item.Bookname || ''), author: String(item.Author || ''), cover: imageCdn + '/' + String(item.Bid || '') + '/m1.webp', status: 'completed', description: toDesc(item), genre: toGenre(item) })); return JSON.stringify({ mangas: mangas, total: total, hasNextPage: page * 20 < total }); })();
actions.description: 调用最新更新接口并映射作品数据

actions.code: (() => { const page = Math.max(1, parseInt('{{page}}', 10) || 1); const query = String(`{{query}}` || '').trim(); const imageCdn = '{{imageCdn}}'; const toGenre = (item) => [String(item.Ptag || '').replace(/\s+/g, ', ').replace(/,+/g, ', ').replace(/^, |, $/g, ''), String(item.Otag || '')].filter(Boolean).join(', '); const toDesc = (item) => ['时间：' + (item.Time ? new Date(Number(item.Time) * 1000).toISOString().replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 19) : ''), '页数：' + String(item.Len || 0), '原作：' + String(item.Otag || ''), '角色：' + String(item.Pname || '')].join('\n'); const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/search_v2', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('page=' + encodeURIComponent(String(page)) + '&info=' + encodeURIComponent(query) + '&type=de&sort=bid'); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 搜索失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (data.status === 'login' || (Array.isArray(data) && data[0] === 'login')) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录已失效'); } const list = Array.isArray(data.info) ? data.info : (Array.isArray(data.Info) ? data.Info : []); const total = Number(data.len || 0); const mangas = list.map((item) => ({ id: String(item.Bid || ''), url: String(item.Bid || ''), title: String(item.Bookname || ''), author: String(item.Author || ''), cover: imageCdn + '/' + String(item.Bid || '') + '/m1.webp', status: 'completed', description: toDesc(item), genre: toGenre(item) })); return JSON.stringify({ mangas: mangas, total: total, hasNextPage: page * 20 < total }); })();

(() => { const page = Math.max(1, parseInt('{{page}}', 10) || 1); const query = String(`{{tagId}}` || '').trim(); const imageCdn = '{{imageCdn}}'; const toGenre = (item) => [String(item.Ptag || '').replace(/\s+/g, ', ').replace(/,+/g, ', ').replace(/^, |, $/g, ''), String(item.Otag || '')].filter(Boolean).join(', '); const toDesc = (item) => ['时间：' + (item.Time ? new Date(Number(item.Time) * 1000).toISOString().replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 19) : ''), '页数：' + String(item.Len || 0), '原作：' + String(item.Otag || ''), '角色：' + String(item.Pname || '')].join('\n'); const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/search_v2', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('page=' + encodeURIComponent(String(page)) + '&info=' + encodeURIComponent(query) + '&type=tag&sort=bid'); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 标签搜索失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (data.status === 'login' || (Array.isArray(data) && data[0] === 'login')) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录已失效'); } const list = Array.isArray(data.info) ? data.info : (Array.isArray(data.Info) ? data.Info : []); const total = Number(data.len || 0); const mangas = list.map((item) => ({ id: String(item.Bid || ''), url: String(item.Bid || ''), title: String(item.Bookname || ''), author: String(item.Author || ''), cover: imageCdn + '/' + String(item.Bid || '') + '/m1.webp', status: 'completed', description: toDesc(item), genre: toGenre(item) })); return JSON.stringify({ mangas: mangas, total: total, hasNextPage: page * 20 < total }); })();

directSearch.description: 作者搜索与作品 ID 直达

actions.code: (() => { const searchType = String(`{{searchType}}` || '').trim(); const query = String(`{{query}}` || '').trim(); const imageCdn = '{{imageCdn}}'; const normalizeId = (value) => { const match = String(value || '').match(/(\d+)/); return match ? match[1] : ''; }; const toGenre = (item) => [String(item.Ptag || '').replace(/\s+/g, ', ').replace(/,+/g, ', ').replace(/^, |, $/g, ''), String(item.Otag || '')].filter(Boolean).join(', '); const toDesc = (item) => ['时间：' + (item.Time ? new Date(Number(item.Time) * 1000).toISOString().replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 19) : ''), '页数：' + String(item.Len || 0), '原作：' + String(item.Otag || ''), '角色：' + String(item.Pname || '')].join('\n'); if (searchType === 'searchByAuthor') { const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/search_v2', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('page=1&info=' + encodeURIComponent(query) + '&type=author&sort=bid'); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 作者搜索失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const data = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (data.status === 'login' || (Array.isArray(data) && data[0] === 'login')) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录已失效'); } const list = Array.isArray(data.info) ? data.info : (Array.isArray(data.Info) ? data.Info : []); const mangas = list.map((item) => ({ id: String(item.Bid || ''), url: String(item.Bid || ''), title: String(item.Bookname || ''), author: String(item.Author || ''), cover: imageCdn + '/' + String(item.Bid || '') + '/m1.webp', status: 'completed', description: toDesc(item), genre: toGenre(item) })); return JSON.stringify({ type: 'list', mangas: mangas, total: Number(data.len || 0), hasNext: list.length >= 20 }); } const mangaId = normalizeId(query); if (!mangaId) { return JSON.stringify({ type: 'list', mangas: [], total: 0, hasNext: false, error: 'invalid_id' }); } return JSON.stringify({ type: 'detail', manga: { id: mangaId, url: mangaId, title: '', cover: imageCdn + '/' + mangaId + '/m1.webp' }, error: null }); })();
actions.description: 根据搜索类型执行作者搜索或作品 ID 直达

actions.code: (() => { const mangaId = String(`{{mangaId}}` || '').match(/(\d+)/); const bid = mangaId ? mangaId[1] : ''; const imageCdn = '{{imageCdn}}'; if (!bid) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 详情缺少作品 ID'); } const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/getbookinfo', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('bid=' + encodeURIComponent(bid)); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 详情获取失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const item = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (item.status === 'login' || (Array.isArray(item) && item[0] === 'login')) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录已失效'); } const genre = [String(item.Ptag || '').replace(/\s+/g, ', ').replace(/,+/g, ', ').replace(/^, |, $/g, ''), String(item.Otag || '')].filter(Boolean).join(', '); const description = ['时间：' + (item.Time ? new Date(Number(item.Time) * 1000).toISOString().replace('T', ' ').slice(0, 19) : ''), '页数：' + String(item.Len || 0), '原作：' + String(item.Otag || ''), '角色：' + String(item.Pname || '')].join('\n'); return JSON.stringify({ id: bid, url: bid, title: String(item.Bookname || ''), author: String(item.Author || ''), cover: imageCdn + '/' + bid + '/m1.webp', status: 'completed', description: description, genre: genre }); })();
actions.description: 通过详情接口组装作品信息

actions.code: (() => { const mangaId = String(`{{mangaId}}` || '').match(/(\d+)/); const bid = mangaId ? mangaId[1] : ''; if (!bid) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 章节缺少作品 ID'); } const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/getbookinfo', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('bid=' + encodeURIComponent(bid)); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 章节获取失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const item = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); if (item.status === 'login' || (Array.isArray(item) && item[0] === 'login')) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 登录已失效'); } const pageCount = Math.max(0, Number(item.Len || 0)); const publishTime = item.Time ? String(Number(item.Time) * 1000) : ''; return JSON.stringify([{ id: bid + '#' + String(pageCount), url: bid + '#' + String(pageCount), title: '单话', publishTime: publishTime, size: pageCount }]); })();

(() => { const raw = String(`{{chapterId}}` || '').trim(); const imageCdn = '{{imageCdn}}'; let bid = ''; let pageCount = 0; if (raw.includes('#')) { const parts = raw.split('#'); bid = String(parts[0] || '').match(/(\d+)/)?.[1] || ''; pageCount = Math.max(0, parseInt(parts[1], 10) || 0); } else { bid = String(raw || '').match(/(\d+)/)?.[1] || ''; } if (!bid) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 页面缺少章节 ID'); } if (!pageCount) { const xhr = new XMLHttpRequest(); xhr.open('POST', '{{baseUrl}}/api/getbookinfo', false); xhr.withCredentials = true; xhr.setRequestHeader('Content-Type', 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded'); xhr.setRequestHeader('Accept', 'application/json, text/plain, */*'); xhr.send('bid=' + encodeURIComponent(bid)); if (xhr.status !== 200) { throw new Error('NoyAcg 页面补全失败: HTTP ' + xhr.status); } const item = JSON.parse(xhr.responseText || '{}'); pageCount = Math.max(0, Number(item.Len || 0)); } const pages = []; for (let i = 1; i <= pageCount; i++) { pages.push({ url: imageCdn + '/' + bid + '/' + String(i) + '.webp' }); } return JSON.stringify(pages); })();
actions.description: 根据作品 ID 与页数生成图片地址

imageHeaders.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 14; Pixel 7) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/147.0.7727.15 Mobile Safari/537.36

notes: 必须先保存账号密码后再使用。
图源会在初始化阶段自动登录，不会把凭据写进 source.json。
当前站点为单章节作品结构，章节列表会固定返回一话。

changes: 支持凭据登录与初始化自动登录。
已验证热门、最新、搜索、详情、章节、页面链路。
